properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v3 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: From the rising sun To the end of the day Your Name will be praised, Jesus Your Name will be praised

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: From the prophets of old To the mouths of babes Your Name will be praised, Jesus Your Name will be praised

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Glory to You, Exalted One Who gave Your life away Glory to You, our Risen King Jesus, Your Name will be praised Your Name will be praised

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: For the gift of new life For Your mercies each day Your Name will be praised, Jesus Your Name will be praised

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Through the darkest of nights When we can't find out way We will walk by faith not sight, Lord And Your Name will be praised

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: For who You are For what You've done For what You've yet to do The song we raise This day we proclaim All glory to You All glory to You, Exalted One Who gave Your life away Glory to You, our Risen King Jesus, Your Name will be praised Your Name will be praised Your Name will be praised
